---
title: "Media"
---

::: {.page-title}
Selected media spaces for presentations, explainers, and learning artefacts connected to analytics, AI, and business strategy.
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.media-grid}
::: {.media-card}
### Analytics Presentation

::: {.media-embed}
Presentation embed placeholder
:::

Short project presentation or recorded walkthrough can be embedded here.
:::

::: {.media-card}
### Data Science Audio

::: {.media-embed}
Podcast embed placeholder
:::

A Spotify episode, reflection audio, or analytics discussion can be embedded here.
:::

::: {.media-card}
### Notebook Walkthrough

::: {.media-embed}
Video embed placeholder
:::

A walkthrough of a Jupyter notebook, model comparison, or project methodology can be embedded here.
:::
:::
:::
